articles.title: Watch: Fans celebrate England's 4-2 World Cup victory over Croatia
articles.description: Supporters for both sides turned out in droves to watch England v Croatia in their opening match of the World Cup.

articles.title: US and Iranian presidents sign deal aiming to end war
articles.description: The fate of Iran's nuclear programme, a key reason cited by the US for starting the conflict, is still to be negotiated.

articles.title: Cervical cancer deaths in England fall to zero in young women given vaccine
articles.description: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.

articles.title: Simpler, older version of Stonehenge found three miles from famous site
articles.description: The structure consisted of two posts that lined up with the solstices 5,000 years ago.
